senses.def_en: to be angry or upset about (sb. or sth. that you think is unfair)
senses.example: Jenna resented having to ask her parents' permission in everything she did.
senses.example_zh: 事事都得征求父母的许可，詹娜很不高兴。

senses.def_en: to make sb. feel impatient, angry, or annoyed
senses.example: His disloyalty irritated his wife, who resolutely left home.
senses.example_zh: 他的不忠激怒了他的妻子，她毅然离开了这个家。

senses.example: If you get bits of hair down on the back of your neck, they will irritate you.
senses.example_zh: 如果头发碎屑落在你脖子后面，你会感到很不舒服。

derivatives: irritable a. 易怒的;过敏的

entries.mnemonic: up(上)+set(放置)→把下面的放在上面了→弄翻

senses.def_en: to make sb. unhappy, worried, etc.
senses.example: The news completely upset them.
senses.example_zh: 这消息使他们极为心烦。

senses.def_en: to disturb the functioning, order, or course of
senses.example: Our arrangements for the weekend were upset by her visit.
senses.example_zh: 她一来把我们周末的安排给打乱了。

senses.example: A large wave upset the boat.
senses.example_zh: 一个巨浪打翻了船。

senses.example: He has a stomach upset.
senses.example_zh: 他的胃不舒服。

senses.example: James was upset because his wallet was stolen.
senses.example_zh: 詹姆斯很烦躁，因为他的钱包被偷了。

senses.def_en: to make changes esp. to correct or improve sth.
senses.example: I'd like you to read my story once I've revised it.
senses.example_zh: 我把故事修改完后，想请你看一遍。

senses.example: She's revising her notes for the exams. // revise for the examination
senses.example_zh: 为了准备考试她正在复习笔记。// 温课迎考

senses.example: Unfortunately, parts of the original manuscript were lost in the fire.
senses.example_zh: 不幸的是，部分原稿在大火中被烧毁了。

senses.example: This is a valuable medieval manuscript.
senses.example_zh: 这是一本有价值的中世纪手抄本。

senses.def_en: to prepare for publication or presentation by correcting, revising, or adapting
senses.example: It is not yet decided who will edit it.
senses.example_zh: 由谁校订未决。

senses.example: She used to edit the Washington Post.
senses.example_zh: 她曾主编过《华盛顿邮报》。

senses.example: The edited film is a selected assembly of all kinds of "bits and pieces".
senses.example_zh: 剪辑片是选用形形色色的“片断和点滴”汇编而成的。

entries.mnemonic: 发音:“一爹生”→一部作品可生成多个“版本”

senses.example: A paperback edition of a book is much cheaper than a deluxe edition.
senses.example_zh: 平装本的书比精装本的书要便宜很多。

senses.example: editorial office/work
senses.example_zh: 编辑部/编辑工作

senses.example: an editorial article
senses.example_zh: 社论

senses.example: He writes editorials for the newspaper.
senses.example_zh: 他为这家报纸撰写社论。

senses.def_en: to ask formally for sth. usu. in writing
senses.example: I want to apply for the job.
senses.example_zh: 我想申请这项工作。

senses.def_en: to have an effect on sb. or sth.
senses.example: The rule doesn't apply to this case.
senses.example_zh: 这条规则不适用于这种情形。

senses.def_en: to use (an idea, method, law, etc.) in a particular situation
senses.example: New technology is being applied to almost every industrial process.
senses.example_zh: 几乎所有的工业生产都采用新技术。

senses.example: You needn't apply so much make-up
